title: eriostemma lauterbachii
intro: Eriostemma lauterbachii is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the Lauterbach's hoya or porcelainflower. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Eriostemma lauterbachii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. Eriostemma lauterbachii can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
